  • weekly picks (Jun 4 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 June 4th week collection

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score :
    Unfold/Fold

    06/23

    1. d41586-026-01801-4 Forty years of high-temperature superconductivity (Nature)

    2. fblj-fthq Quantum dynamical signatures of topological flow transitions in limit cycle phases (PRR)

    3. rt48-gpfm One-particle density matrix framework for mode-shell correspondence: Characterizing topology in amorphous higher-order topological insulators (PRR)

    4. 5cy2-3xjk Optimal work extraction from finite-time closed quantum dynamics (PRR)

    5. 86rf-6dvz Enhanced plasma production by ambipolar electric fields in convergent magnetic fields (PRR)

    6. g38t-lcj3 Ligand-mediated magnetic coupling across metamagnetic transitions in ${\mathrm{CrPS}}_{4}$ (PRR)

    7. gx1m-3fs2 Excited eigenstates from a two-species random walk (PRR)

    8. l9bp-dccf Gradient scalability and Taylor surrogation of quantum cost landscapes (PRR)

    9. 2606.20782v1 Boosting lattice polarization Mixing the perspectives of geometry optimization and cell-augmentation (arXiv)

    10. 2606.20807v1 Tuning ergodicity breaking: Anomalous diffusion under asymptotic power-law forcing (arXiv)

    11. 2606.20808v1 Partition function zeros of quantum many-body systems: perturbative results (arXiv)
